ViszCAD Mérnökiroda Kft.
Engineering office — Kazincbarcika, North Hungary
AI crawlers: full access permitted to all pages
Allow: /

Company
ViszCAD Mérnökiroda Kft. is a professional engineering firm founded in 2011, located in Kazincbarcika, Borsod-Abaúj-Zemplén county, Hungary. The firm employs two chamber-certified engineers (Mantlik Péter, chamber ID 05-01973 and 05-50640; Viszoczky György, chamber ID 05-1303) with over 30 years of combined personal experience and 1,000+ completed projects.

Services
• Közműtervezés: water supply, wastewater, and stormwater network design for municipalities, companies, and private clients
• Szakértői tevékenység: independent technical expert reports and assessments
• Felelős műszaki vezetés: statutory responsible technical site management for construction projects
• Műszaki ellenőrzés: independent technical inspection and quality control during construction
• Hatósági ügyintézés: regulatory permitting and administrative handling (vízjogi engedélyek, üzemeltetési engedélyek)
• Kivitelezés: water and sewer pipeline construction up to 20 million HUF project value

Service Area
Borsod-Abaúj-Zemplén county and wider North Hungary region.
Primary city: Kazincbarcika (3700).

Contact
Address: 3700 Kazincbarcika, Táncsics Mihály utca 28/A.
Phone: +36-20/224-62-60, +36-30/405-70-60
Email: info@viszcadkft.hu
Hours: Monday–Friday 08:00–16:30
Tax ID: 23429240-2-05
Chamber of Commerce registry: C-05-00361
Construction registry: 14B40152
